profile.name: Khushi Mehta
profile.summary: I'm a Software Engineer with 1-2 years of experience building scalable and maintainable web applications using React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB. I’ve also gained hands-on experience with Spring Boot and Angular, showcasing adaptability across both frontend and backend development. I’ve worked on projects like PlutonalAI, Fundation, and HRMS suites, contributing to impactful features and delivering solutions ahead of deadlines. I’m based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India.

experience.description: Working on an Workflow automation platform enabling users to design and execute workflows by creating nodes and connecting edges. Integrated Google Sheet/Drive, HTTP requests, Gmail, databases to automate multi-step tasks and streamline operations. Developed features for PlutonalAI (React.js), an AI-driven platform for financial insights and market analysis, including an interactive AI chat interface, Worked on the 1FCode Banking Project, where I created APIs for nominee management, certificate upload, and payload encoding/decoding, called third party APIs as well Worked on Elsner’s product Weekmate, an enterprise solution containing multi-tenant: HRMS TaskHub Payroll EConnect CRM
Worked on Fundation (investment management tool in React) and built backend for an AI-powered avatar app enabling image generation, email delivery, and secure data handling

Built a scalable multi-branch restaurant management system with role-based access (3 users) and centralized restaurant onboarding.Developed real-time order management, notifications, and tracking, including monitoring average order processing time per branch.

education.degree: Master of Science in Information Technology
Bachelor of Science in Information Technology

projects.title: Blogbuzz
projects.description: Article posting system allowing users to post articles with a dashboard for verify/not verify article and admin panel. Allow user to manage user profile.
